queries.question: Show me the names and yields of crops each farm grows.
queries.sql: SELECT Crops.CropName, Crops.YieldPerAcre  from FarmsCrops join Crops on FarmsCrops.CropID = Crops.CropID join Farms on FarmsCrops.FarmID = Farms.FarmID   GROUP BY FarmsCrops.CropID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT FarmsCrops.FarmID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Farms)

queries.question: Show me the names and yields of crops each farm grows.
queries.sql: select farms.name , crops.cropname , crops.yieldperacre from FarmsCrops join Crops on FarmsCrops.CropID = Crops.CropID join Farms on FarmsCrops.FarmID = Farms.FarmID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?cropname ?yieldperacre WHERE {
  ?farmscrops a :FarmsCrops .
  ?crops a :Crop .
  ?farmscrops p:hasCrop ?crops .
  ?farms a :Farm .
  ?farmscrops p:hasFarm ?farms .
  ?farms p:name ?name .
  ?crops p:name ?cropname .
  ?crops p:yieldPerAcre ?yieldperacre .
}

queries.question: Give me the crops that are the same on all farms.
queries.sql: SELECT Crops.CropName  from FarmsCrops join Crops on FarmsCrops.CropID = Crops.CropID join Farms on FarmsCrops.FarmID = Farms.FarmID   GROUP BY FarmsCrops.CropID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT FarmsCrops.FarmID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Farms)

queries.question: What kind of crop does each farm offer?
queries.sql: select farms.name , crops.cropname from FarmsCrops join Crops on FarmsCrops.CropID = Crops.CropID join Farms on FarmsCrops.FarmID = Farms.FarmID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?cropname WHERE {
  ?farmscrops a :FarmsCrops .
  ?crops a :Crop .
  ?farmscrops p:hasCrop ?crops .
  ?farms a :Farm .
  ?farmscrops p:hasFarm ?farms .
  ?farms p:name ?name .
  ?crops p:name ?cropname .
}

queries.question: What yields of crops are common to all farms?
queries.sql: SELECT Crops.YieldPerAcre  from FarmsCrops join Crops on FarmsCrops.CropID = Crops.CropID join Farms on FarmsCrops.FarmID = Farms.FarmID   GROUP BY FarmsCrops.CropID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT FarmsCrops.FarmID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Farms)

queries.question: For every farm, list the yields of crops that are grown.
queries.sql: select farms.name , crops.yieldperacre from FarmsCrops join Crops on FarmsCrops.CropID = Crops.CropID join Farms on FarmsCrops.FarmID = Farms.FarmID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?yieldperacre WHERE {
  ?farmscrops a :FarmsCrops .
  ?crops a :Crop .
  ?farmscrops p:hasCrop ?crops .
  ?farms a :Farm .
  ?farmscrops p:hasFarm ?farms .
  ?farms p:name ?name .
  ?crops p:yieldPerAcre ?yieldperacre .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the names and yields of crops each farm grows.
What kind of crop does each farm offer?
Show me the yields of crops that each farm grows.
